nasb.text: Greet the brethren who are in Laodicea and also Nympha and the church that is in her house.

esv.text: Give my greetings to the brothers at Laodicea, and to Nympha and the church in her house.

cnv.text: 請問候在老底嘉的弟兄和寧法，以及在她家裡的教會。

ccb.text: 请代我问候在老底嘉的弟兄姊妹，也问候宁法姊妹和在她家里聚会的人。

csbs.text: 请问候在劳迪西亚的弟兄们，还有宁法以及在她家里的教会。
